title: git_commit
description: Stage files and create a git commit with a message; returns the resulting commit hash.

message.description: Commit message. Should follow conventional commits format.

files.description: List of file paths to stage before committing. Omit or set 'all' to stage all changes.

all.description: If true, stage all tracked modified files (equivalent to git commit -a).

signoff.description: If true, append a Signed-off-by trailer to the commit message.
